message:
fix(airtable): reduce lock scope in schema cache lookup and clean up lifetime elision

The schema cache lookup in get_base_schema_cached held the Mutex guard
across the TTL check and return, which could block concurrent callers
unnecessarily. Refactored to clone the cached value and release the lock
before performing the staleness check.

Also applied Rust lifetime elision to require_base_id (removing explicit
'a annotations that Clippy flags as unnecessary) and updated mock base
IDs in integration tests to use valid format (appABC123 instead of
appABC, which is too short for the length validation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
